equation_payload.name: Brotli decompression cascade is bounded per stream container
equation_payload.one_line_summary: For brotli-coded archives, a single raw-byte mutation cascade is bounded by the stream container it lives in (NOT the full archive).

notes: initial_population_2026_05_19

equation_payload.name: MPS-vs-CUDA drift reduction is a function of architecture features
equation_payload.one_line_summary: MPS drift corrections are NO-OP for architectures lacking the noise sources they target; calibrate per architecture class via predict_drift(features).

notes: initial_population_2026_05_19

equation_payload.name: Top-K byte leverage scales near-linearly with K (not Pareto-concentrated) for entropy-coded archives
equation_payload.one_line_summary: Per-byte optimization saturates quickly; substrate-class shifts dominate per-byte edits on entropy-coded archives (PR101 top-1% leverage = 6.4%).

notes: initial_population_2026_05_19

equation_payload.name: Per-pair score impact via Taylor first-order + Cauchy-Schwarz bound
equation_payload.one_line_summary: For drift d in master-gradient g-space: delta_S_p ~= sum_i g_{i,p} * d_i; |delta_S_p| <= ||g_p||_2 * ||d||_2 (Cauchy-Schwarz).

notes: initial_population_2026_05_19

equation_payload.name: Raw-byte master-gradient violates locality for entropy-coded archives; post-decompress is the canonical basis
equation_payload.one_line_summary: For entropy-coded archives: g_raw(b) != g_post_decompress(b); use post-decompress grain for per-byte sensitivity work.

notes: initial_population_2026_05_19

equation_payload.name: Frontier scores are pointer-only; hardcoded literals drift
equation_payload.one_line_summary: F = argmax_anchor score(anchor) over qualifying hardware x qualifying axis; consult tac.canonical_frontier_pointer instead of hardcoded literals.

equation_payload.name: Closed-form Lagrange multipliers for contest score
equation_payload.one_line_summary: lambda_pose / lambda_seg = 5 / (sqrt(10*d_pose)*100); operating-point-dependent

equation_payload.one_line_summary: Per-axis L/(2*sigma**2) + log(sigma) (Kendall 2018) + per-pair (1-p)^gamma (Lin 2017)
